content: Phase A.1 — Add BRIGHTDATA_API_KEY + BRIGHTDATA_ZONE to /app/backend/.env
Phase A.2 — Create brightdata_fetcher.py (in-process HTTP client, no subprocess needed)
Phase A.4 — Extend editorial_context_service.py dispatcher to include BrightData as third backend
Phase A.5 — Add requires_unlocker flag in registry; mark Sportytrader/BeSoccer/scores24; add NBA editorial sources
Phase A.6 — Smoke test BrightData fetcher end-to-end with a real NBA + a blocked football source
